AgentChat

No project = a scratch workspace. Every turn is snapshotted either way.

▌claude ▌codex ▌aider ▌swival

Pick a client and a model each turn. They take turns on the same workspace, and every turn is pinned to a snapshot.

Start a conversation to begin.

Artifacts

    Settings

    Appearance

    User themes are JSON files in the themes directory below — see docs/theme.example.json. Edits apply on the next switch.

    Locations

    Coding clients

    Configure providers, models, and efforts in config.json.

    AgentChat

    A chat GUI whose "models" are terminal coding agents — Claude Code, Codex, Aider, and Swival take turns on one workspace, with every turn pinned to a snapshot.
